title: [Control systems] Mitsubishi Electric security advisory (AV26-191)
description: On March 2, 2026, Mitsubishi Electric published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: MELSEC iQ-F Series FX5-ENET/IP Ethernet Module FX5-ENET/IP  all versions
MELSEC iQ-F Series FX5-EIP EtherNet/IP Module FX5-EIP  all versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
